purpose: Regression fixtures for Gate 1 of the Philippines Building Code Evidence Auditor. These cases test lightweight building identity confirmation before any permit, contractor, incident, compliance, safety, or code-evidence search begins.
fixture_notice: All sample places and source links in this file are workflow fixtures. They are not public evidence about real buildings.

cases.description: The abbreviation KCC can refer to KCC Malls or the Korean Cultural Center, so the workflow asks one broad narrowing question.
acceptance_checks: identity_candidates contains two or three candidates

cases.description: KCC Mall identifies the brand but not the branch, so the workflow asks for branch or city.
acceptance_checks: identity_candidates contains two or three branch candidates
prompt asks for the exact branch or city

cases.description: KCC GenSan is specific enough to present KCC Mall of GenSan as the best candidate but still requires user confirmation.
acceptance_checks: confirmation prompt asks the user to confirm the exact place

cases.description: A restaurant inside SM North requires tenant-vs-building scope clarification.
acceptance_checks: clarifying question asks whether to audit tenant, whole building, or both

cases.description: A mixed-use complex clue requires scope clarification before choosing one structure.
acceptance_checks: prompt asks whether the user means the whole complex or a specific building

cases.description: A vague landmark-only clue asks for city, link, photo, receipt, or booking page.
acceptance_checks: clarifying_questions contains exactly one minimum useful question

cases.description: The user rejects the best guess, so the workflow clears the selected candidate and asks for one better clue.
acceptance_checks: previous rejected candidate may remain in identity_candidates as context
prompt does not proceed to audit

cases.description: The user explicitly confirms the exact building, allowing only the next intent-lock stage to begin.
acceptance_checks: can_proceed_to_audit is true only after confirmation
